  • Uses of CardDTO in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.GUI

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.GUI with parameters of type CardDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    GUIObserver.onCardAddedToTribe(String nickname, CardDTO card)
    Called when a card is added to a player's tribe.
    Method parameters in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.GUI with type arguments of type CardDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    GUIObserver.onAskExtraDraw(List<CardDTO> cards, List<BuildingDTO> buildings)
    Called when the player must choose an extra card or building to draw at the end of a round (triggered by the draw-one-more building effect).
    default void
    GUIObserver.onMarketInitialized(List<CardDTO> top, List<CardDTO> bot, List<BuildingDTO> topBld, List<BuildingDTO> botBld)
    Called once at game start with the full initial market state.
    default void
    GUIObserver.onTopCardRefreshed(List<CardDTO> top)
    Called when the top card row is refreshed after an end-of-round market action.

    Method
    Description

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    MarketController.onAskExtraDraw(List<CardDTO> cards, List<BuildingDTO> buildings)
    Called when the server asks the local player to draw an extra card at end of round.

    Called when the market is initialized with the initial card lists.

    Called at end of round when the top-row tribe cards are refreshed.

    Method

    ArtistCard.toDTO()

    abstract CardDTO
    Card.toDTO()
    Converts this card to a data-transfer object for network transport.

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Card with parameters of type CardDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    ArtistCard.matchesDTO(CardDTO dto)
    Checks whether this artist card matches the provided DTO by comparing card type and era.
    boolean
    BuilderCard.matchesDTO(CardDTO dto)
    Checks whether this builder card matches the provided DTO by comparing card type, era, and builder ID.
    boolean
    BuildingCard.matchesDTO(CardDTO dto)
    Building cards are never restored via DTO (they are recreated by the factory using their ID), so this method always returns false.
    abstract boolean
    Card.matchesDTO(CardDTO dto)
    Returns true if this card matches the given DTO snapshot (used during game restore).
    boolean
    EventCard.matchesDTO(CardDTO dto)
    Checks whether this event card matches the provided DTO by comparing card type and event ID.
    boolean
    GathererCard.matchesDTO(CardDTO dto)
    Checks whether this gatherer card matches the provided DTO by comparing card type and era.
    boolean
    HuntersCard.matchesDTO(CardDTO dto)
    Checks whether this hunter card matches the provided DTO by comparing card type, era, and the icon flag.
    boolean
    InventorCard.matchesDTO(CardDTO dto)
    Checks whether this inventor card matches the given DTO by comparing card type, era, and invention icon.
    boolean
    ShamanCard.matchesDTO(CardDTO dto)
    Checks whether this shaman card matches the provided DTO by comparing card type, era, and star rating.

    DeckFactory.loadDeck(List<CardDTO> cards)

  • Uses of CardDTO in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.DTOs

    Subclasses of CardDTO in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.DTOs
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BuildingDTO
    DTO for a BuildingCard, carrying the building ID, food cost, end-game prestige points, and trigger event type.
    class 
    EventDTO
    Data-transfer object for an event card, carrying the event ID and type so the client can display a human-readable description of the event.
    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.DTOs that return types with arguments of type CardDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<CardDTO>
    MarketDTO.getBottomCards()
    Returns the cards in the bottom row of the market.
    List<CardDTO>
    PlayerDTO.getCardDtoList()
    Returns the list of tribe cards belonging to this player.
    List<CardDTO>
    MarketDTO.getTopCards()
    Returns the cards in the top row of the market.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ClientRemoteInterface.addedCardToTribe(String nickname, CardDTO cardDTO)
    Notifies the client that a tribe card was added to the given player's tribe.
    Method parameters in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.RMI with type arguments of type CardDTO
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ClientRemoteInterface.askExtraDraw(List<CardDTO> snapshotCards, List<BuildingDTO> snapshotBuildings)
    Asks the client to select one extra card from the end-of-round market snapshot (draw-one-more building effect).
    void
    ClientRemoteInterface.initializeMarket(List<CardDTO> topCards, List<CardDTO> bottomCards, List<BuildingDTO> topBuildings, List<BuildingDTO> bottomBuildings)
    Sends the initial market state (top/bottom card rows and top building row) to the client.
    void
    ClientRemoteInterface.topCardRefreshed(List<CardDTO> topCards)
    Notifies the client that the top card row has been refreshed with new cards.
